solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def subtractProductAndSum(self, n: int) -> int:
        product = 1
        summation = 0
        while n > 0:
            digit = n % 10
            product *= digit
            summation += digit
            n //= 10
        return product - summation
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The algorithm extracts each digit of the number using modulo and integer division operations. It simultaneously calculates the product and sum of the digits in a single pass, minimizing computational overhead. The time complexity is logarithmic in the value of n due to the number of digits being proportional to log(n). The space complexity is constant as only a few variables are used.
